questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.chapter: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Which of the following element has highest molar atomic volume among the given elements in $\mathrm{cm}^3 \mathrm{~mol}^{-1}$ ?
questions.solution:
Cs has the highest atomic volume
$\mathrm{Cs}\gt\mathrm{Rb}\gt\mathrm{Xe}\gt\mathrm{Eu}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.chapter: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: An element has the atomic number $\mathbf{Z = 9 1}$. Which of the following is incorrect for the given element?
options: The group number in which element is placed is three
The period number in which element is placed is seven
The outermost electronic configuration is $5 f^3 7 s^2$
questions.solution: $5 f^2 7 s^2 \mathbf{6} d^1=$ outer most electronic configuration.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
